title: Copper Vastu Spring
shortDescription: Premium copper vastu spring for energy balancing and vastu defect correction.
description: The Copper Vastu Spring is designed according to vastu principles to improve positive energy circulation and neutralize negative vibrations. Crafted from premium quality copper, this spring is commonly used in vastu remedies for balancing disturbed zones and enhancing harmony in residential and commercial spaces. Ideal for concealed installations in walls, floors, and directional correction areas.
benefits: Suitable for home and office use

title: Iron Vastu Spring
shortDescription: Durable iron vastu spring for grounding energies and directional imbalance correction.
description: The Iron Vastu Spring is specially crafted for grounding unstable energies and correcting vastu imbalances. Iron is associated with strength and stability, making this spring effective for reducing negative vibrations and supporting balanced energy flow. Perfect for vastu remedies in homes, offices, and commercial spaces.
benefits: Ideal for residential and commercial applications

title: Stainless Steel Vastu Spring
shortDescription: Premium stainless steel vastu spring for long-lasting energy correction and stability.
description: The Stainless Steel Vastu Spring is designed for modern vastu applications requiring durability and balanced energy correction. Made from premium stainless steel, this spring supports energetic stability while resisting corrosion and wear. It is ideal for long-term vastu remedies and concealed installations.

title: Brass Vastu Spring
shortDescription: Elegant brass vastu spring for positivity, prosperity, and spiritual harmony.
description: The Brass Vastu Spring combines vastu correction benefits with spiritual energy enhancement. Brass is traditionally linked with positivity, prosperity, and purification. This spring helps improve harmonious energy circulation and reduce negative vibrations in homes, offices, temples, and meditation spaces.
benefits: Ideal for sacred and meditation spaces

title: Aluminium Vastu Spring
shortDescription: Lightweight aluminium vastu spring for affordable and effective energy balancing.
description: The Aluminium Vastu Spring is a practical and lightweight vastu remedy designed to support balanced energy movement and correction of disturbed zones. Its corrosion-resistant and durable structure makes it ideal for modern homes and offices requiring effective vastu solutions at an affordable price.
